data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a 5.14% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2025, 06:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.049988 USDT, with a narrowed 5.14% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitget will list Mind Network (FHE)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget will launch Mind Network (FHE) in the Innovation Zone, Web3 and AI Zone at 22:00 (UTC+8) on April 10.

data.title: UXLINK Joins Stanford University’s Future Digital Currency Initiative (FDCI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, UXLINK announced that it has joined the Stanford University Future Digital Currency Initiative (FDCI) and become an official member of Stanford FDCI.

UXLINK, as one of the world's largest social infrastructure and platforms, has been committed to promoting the large-scale adoption of Web3 and promoting the overall growth of the industry. Stanford University, as the world's top research institution and the cradle of countless entrepreneurs, its "Future of Digital Currency Initiative" (FDCI) under the Department of Computer Science focuses on exploring the emerging role of digital currency in enhancing global financial inclusion. This vision is highly consistent with UXLINK's mission.

The strategic cooperation with Stanford FDCI reflects UXLINK's firm commitment to continue to invest in research and development and directly address these challenges. Through this cooperation, UXLINK will work together to promote innovation and help achieve the ambitious goal of global financial inclusion.

data.title: Binance Simple Earn adds RIF staking product
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance SimpleEarn will add the Rootstock Infrastructure Framework (RIF) lock-up product from 10:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025 to 09:59 (UTC) on October 10, 2025. Users can subscribe to 30-day, 60-day or 120-day products and receive an annualized rate of return of 3%, 5.5% and 9.9% respectively. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Westpac CEO publicly apologizes for freezing customer accounts due to Bitcoin purchases
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Anthony Miller, CEO of Westpac, one of the four major banks in Australia, recently publicly apologized for freezing customer accounts. The incident was caused by a customer named Tim who tried to transfer 30,000 Australian dollars to the crypto trading platform CoinSpot to buy BTC, and was subsequently intercepted and frozen by the bank's risk control team.
Tim said that he missed the gains of BTC due to the inability to operate in time, and publicly released the recording of the call with the bank on Sydney 2GB Radio, which aroused public attention. Miller later responded on the 2GB program that although anti-fraud measures are necessary, there are problems in communication and handling of this incident, and Westpac will seek improvements.
The incident occurred at a time when the Australian government is promoting de-banking and transparency reforms related to the crypto industry. (decrypt)

data.title: Ancient ETH whales have completed liquidation, selling a total of 9,095 ETH in three years and cashing out a total of $12.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, an address completed the final 2024 ETH liquidation transaction, worth about $2.96 million, ending its 2.4-year silence. Data shows that the address has sold a total of 9095 ETH in three years, with an average selling price of $1,375, and a total cash out of about $12.5 million. On-chain records show that the address can be traced back to the withdrawal behavior of Kraken and Bitfinex 10 years ago.

data.title: DWF Labs Opens Applications for $250 Million Liquidity Fund
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DWF Labs announced that its $250 million Liquid Fund is now open for applications. The fund will provide strategic funding and ecological support for medium and large market value token projects, aiming to promote the real application and sustainable development of the crypto industry. DWF Labs said that the fund will help projects achieve long-term growth and enhance ecological vitality.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market saw liquidations totaling $478 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $130 million of the liquidations, while short positions amounted to $348 million. Bitcoin liquidations reached $180 million, and Ethereum liquidations totaled $136 million.
